anime_pulse_items.title: One Piece Chapter 1118: Luffy's Gear 5th vs. Imu Revealed!
anime_pulse_items.summary: The latest chapter drops today with a shocking face-off between Luffy's Gear 5th and the mysterious Imu. Fans are exploding over the implications for the final saga. Chapter 1118 is trending worldwide on Twitter with over 2 million posts.

anime_pulse_items.title: Death Note: New Anime Project Announced for 2027!
anime_pulse_items.summary: Studio Madhouse officially announces a brand-new Death Note anime project, set for a 2027 release. Fans are speculating if it's a sequel, reboot, or adaptation of the 'One-Shot' chapter. The announcement dropped on Crunchyroll's official Twitter.

anime_pulse_items.title: Boruto TBV Chapter 15: Code's True Plan Exposed!
anime_pulse_items.summary: Boruto: Two Blue Vortex Chapter 15 reveals Code's master plan to use the Ten-Tails against the shinobi world. The chapter is a massive game-changer for the series, with Boruto fans debating the lore implications on Reddit.

anime_pulse_items.title: Dragon Ball Daima Episode 7: Goku Mini vs. Majin Buu!
anime_pulse_items.summary: The latest episode of Dragon Ball Daima features an epic battle between Mini Goku and a mysterious Majin Buu variant. Fans are praising the animation quality and callbacks to the original series. Episode 7 trends on Netflix globally.

anime_pulse_items.title: Jujutsu Kaisen Season 3: Culling Game Arc Gets Release Date!
anime_pulse_items.summary: Crunchyroll confirms Jujutsu Kaisen Season 3 will premiere on October 3, 2026. New PV showcases Sukuna vs. Kashimo and Yuji's domain expansion. The announcement has over 500k likes on Twitter within an hour.

anime_pulse_items.title: Demon Slayer: Infinity Castle Movie Trilogy - First Look Trailer!
anime_pulse_items.summary: Ufotable releases the first trailer for the Infinity Castle movie trilogy, showcasing stunning animation of the final battle. The trilogy will be released in theaters worldwide starting December 2026. Trailer trends #1 on YouTube.

anime_pulse_items.title: Attack on Titan: The Final Season - Lost Girls OVA Announced!
anime_pulse_items.summary: Studio MAPPA announces a new OVA series focusing on Annie and Mikasa's backstories, set after the main series. Reddit explodes with theories connecting to the ending. OVA to release on Crunchyroll in August 2026.

anime_pulse_items.title: My Hero Academia Chapter 430: Final Battle - Deku vs. All For One!
anime_pulse_items.summary: The penultimate chapter of My Hero Academia features Deku's final stand against All For One, with a shocking sacrifice from Bakugo. Manga sales surge 300% on the day of release. The ending speculation is at an all-time high.

anime_pulse_items.title: Chainsaw Man Season 2: New Key Visual and Character Designs!
anime_pulse_items.summary: MAPPA releases a new key visual for Chainsaw Man Season 2, featuring Denji and the new cast. The season is confirmed for July 2026. Fans on Reddit analyze the visual for hidden details about the Reze arc.

anime_pulse_items.title: Spy x Family Season 3: New Mission in Berlint!
anime_pulse_items.summary: Spy x Family Season 3 episode 1 airs today on Crunchyroll, featuring a new mission for Loid and a school event for Anya. The episode breaks Crunchyroll's streaming record with 5 million views in the first 24 hours.

anime_pulse_items.title: Frieren: Beyond Journey's End Wins Anime of the Year at Crunchyroll Awards!
anime_pulse_items.summary: Frieren sweeps the Crunchyroll Anime Awards 2026 with 7 wins including Anime of the Year. Season 2 hype intensifies as the studio announces production. The awards ceremony trends worldwide.

anime_pulse_items.title: Solo Leveling Season 2: Jeju Island Raid Trailer Drops!
anime_pulse_items.summary: A-1 Pictures releases the first trailer for Solo Leveling Season 2, covering the Jeju Island arc. The trailer showcases Sung Jin-Woo's antics and epic battles. Fans compare the animation to the manhwa, with mixed reactions.

anime_pulse_items.title: Crunchyroll Announces Simulcast for 'The Rising of the Shield Hero' Season 4!
anime_pulse_items.summary: Crunchyroll confirms that Shield Hero Season 4 will be simulcast starting June 1, 2026. The announcement includes a new poster and voice cast. Fans on Reddit discuss the possible adaptation of the Spirit Tortoise arc.
anime_pulse_items.niche: The Rising of the Shield Hero

anime_pulse_items.title: Netflix's 'One Piece' Live-Action Season 2 Casting Revealed!
anime_pulse_items.summary: Netflix announces the cast for One Piece live-action Season 2, including the actors for Chopper, Robin, and Vivi. The showrunners promise a more faithful adaptation. The news trends on Twitter with over 1 million mentions.

anime_pulse_items.title: Reddit's r/anime Debates: Best Anime of 2026 So Far!
anime_pulse_items.summary: A massive thread on r/anime with over 10k comments debates the best anime of 2026, with Frieren, Solo Leveling, and Dandadan as top contenders. The thread is stickied and has been trending for 24 hours.

anime_pulse_items.title: Dandadan Episode 8: Alien Invasion Arc Heats Up!
anime_pulse_items.summary: The latest episode of Dandadan on Crunchyroll delivers a high-octane battle between Momo and a new alien threat. The episode's animation is praised as some of the best of the season. Fans create fan art that goes viral on Twitter.

anime_pulse_items.title: Vinland Saga Season 3: Farmland Arc Gets Release Window!
anime_pulse_items.summary: Studio MAPPA announces Vinland Saga Season 3 will premiere in January 2027, covering the Farmland arc. The announcement includes a new teaser visual. Fans on Reddit express excitement for the peaceful arc.

anime_pulse_items.title: Mob Psycho 100: New OVA 'Spirit and Such' Released on Crunchyroll!
anime_pulse_items.summary: Crunchyroll drops a surprise OVA for Mob Psycho 100, focusing on Reigen's past. The OVA is 30 minutes long and features the same high-quality animation from Bones. Fans are overjoyed, with the OVA trending on Twitter.
